name: io.github.Saperly/saperly-mcp
description: Phone carrier for AI agents. Provision numbers, make calls, send SMS, TCPA compliance built-in.

environmentVariables.name: SAPERLY_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Saperly API key. Use a regular API key (sk_live_... or sk_test_...) for line/call/SMS tools, or a service key (sk_svc_live_... or sk_svc_test_...) if you want to use the saperly_key_* tools to mint child keys at runtime. Get one at https://saperly.com/settings/keys. $5 free signup credit (never expires; ~38 min webhook voice).

environmentVariables.name: SAPERLY_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the Saperly API base URL. Optional — only set for local dev or staging environments.
